title: Test WebSocket firehose
notes: WebSocket handshake works. Initial state sent on connect. Real-time commit events NOT emitted from createRecord - requires wiring up broadcastRepositoryCommit in PDSController.createRecordForDid

title: Test with pdsls.dev
notes:
Successfully tested with pdsls.dev:
- Real PLC registration works (did:plc:uf6ka4q2e75elehzaj4ch5ft)
- Account creation with handle realtest.september.exe.xyz
- Post creation works
- Blob upload works (avatar image)
- Profile with avatar displays correctly
- All data visible and accessible in pdsls.dev

description: handleRead method in PDSNetworkTransportLinux.m:87-89 is empty. This breaks the Linux network transport layer. Need to implement actual read logic using recv() and buffer management.

title: Rewrite all documentation files in docs/ to eliminate LLM-isms and professionalize technical content
Fix: Compat layer headers missing stdint.h and failing on macOS
description: Compat layer headers at Sources/Compat/ are missing #include <stdint.h> and have OpenSSL dependencies that break macOS builds. Errors: Security.h needs stdint.h, SecRandom.h needs stdint.h, CommonDigest.h needs stdint.h and openssl/sha.h not found. These headers should either: (1) work on both platforms, or (2) use #ifndef __APPLE__ guards properly.

title: Update PDSRecordService to use DAG-CBOR for CID calculation
description:
The integration-tests worktree uses NSJSONSerialization for CID calculation, which produces non-compliant CIDs.

Main branch has the correct implementation using ATProtoCBORSerialization.

Required changes:
1. Import ATProtoCBORSerialization.h in PDSRecordService.m
2. Replace NSJSONSerialization with [ATProtoCBORSerialization encodeDataWithJSONObject:error:]
3. Test that CID generation produces spec-compliant output

See main branch commit 4b3f6af for reference implementation.

title: Replace os_log_t with POSIX syslog
description: os_log_t is Apple-only. Create PDSLogging.h compat header with syslog-based implementation for Linux. Fix all usages in PDSAccountService.m and other files.

description: The HTTP server currently processes requests before the full body is received. This breaks POST/PUT requests spanning multiple packets. See docs/analysis/NETWORKING_REVIEW.md for details.

title: Restore CBOR map sorting test in IdentifierTests
description:
Main branch added testCBORMapSorting test that verifies DAG-CBOR map key sorting.

Integration-tests branch has the older version of IdentifierTests.m without this test.

The test verifies that { 'b': 2, 'a': 1 } encodes the same as { 'a': 1, 'b': 2 } - required for deterministic CID generation.

See main branch commit d2a2273.

title: Replace CommonCrypto with OpenSSL
description: CommonCrypto kCCSuccess is 0. OpenSSL functions return 1 for success, 0 for failure. Need to create CryptoCompat.h with mappings for kCCSuccess -> 0.

title: Add missing ATProtoCBORSerialization class to integration-tests
description:
Main branch added ATProtoCBORSerialization.h/m for DAG-CBOR encoding.

Integration-tests worktree needs this file to properly implement CBOR-based CID calculation.

Copy from main branch or create based on main branch implementation.

See main branch commit 4b3f6af.
